case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. STEPHANIE MARILOU ROSALES

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSALES, STEPHANIE MARILOU $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ROSALES, STEPHANIE MARILOU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-23-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED APR-02-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROSALES, STEPHANIE MARILOU

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-23-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-23-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DONNA ALBERTO , LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
